summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for 4-phase TLJ build (price tags, marketplace inquiry chat, blog CMS, contact page, mobile nav). 25/25 backend tests pass; frontend mostly works EXCEPT /blog/:slug detail page crashes with Helmet runtime error.

ui_bugs.issue: Uncaught runtime error: 'Helmet expects a string as a child of <title>'. pageTitle resolves to empty string when post.meta_title is '' (falsy) or rendered before post is fully loaded — falls through to template literal that React Helmet receives as ``. Entire blog detail page fails to render and JSON-LD BlogPosting schema is NOT present in DOM.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Guard against empty string: const pageTitle = (post.meta_title && post.meta_title.trim()) || (post.title ? `${post.title} | The Local Jewel` : 'The Local Jewel Journal'); AND ensure the Helmet block only renders when post.title is non-empty.

passed_tests: POST /api/contact creates submission and appears in admin contact-submissions list
POST /api/contact returns 400 when message missing
POST /api/projects/{slug}/inquire returns 404 for bad slug, 400 for missing fields, success creates thread+lead+JWT
GET /api/me/threads + /api/me/threads/{id} work with returned JWT; reply increments admin_unread_count; missing auth returns 401
GET /api/admin/threads list, q-search by email, status=active filter all work
POST /api/admin/threads/{id}/reply pushes admin message; PATCH status closed/active works
Blog CRUD: POST creates, duplicate slug → 400, GET admin list shows post, PUT updates title, DELETE removes; public GET /api/blog excludes drafts; GET /api/blog/{slug} returns content_html and no _id
Project price fields persist (price=2850), price_prefix='Starting at', price_currency='USD' visible in GET /api/projects/{slug}; admin PUT can update price
Sitemap.xml contains /blog, /contact, /blog/how-to-pick-a-lab-grown-diamond, /projects/4-41-carat-radiant-hidden-halo-engagement-ring
POST /api/uploads with audio/webm MIME returns media_type='audio'
Frontend: Header on desktop shows text nav (Projects, Journal, Contact, Call, Login)
Frontend: Mobile (390x844) shows 'Menu' button — clicking reveals dropdown with Projects/Journal/Contact
Frontend: /projects index displays 'Starting at $2,850' price tag badge on project card
Frontend: /projects/{slug} hero shows large 'STARTING AT $2,850' price tag
Frontend: 'Start a piece like this' CTA opens QuickQuoteModal (Step 1 of 5: name, metal, carat, email, phone) — does NOT navigate to homepage
Frontend: Project detail page shows marketplace inquiry input pre-filled with 'Hi - is this available?' and Send button
Frontend: /contact renders Call/Email/Studio cards; form submits successfully and shows success state
Frontend: /blog index renders 'Notes from the studio' with All/Diamond Guides filter tabs and 1 published post card
Frontend: /admin/blog renders 'Journal (Blog)' admin with 'New post' button and seeded post row (edit/delete icons)
Frontend: /admin/messages renders Messages inbox with All/Active/Closed/Spam filters, search input, thread list (3 threads created during testing)
action_items: HIGH: Fix BlogDetailPage.js Helmet <title> crash — guard pageTitle to never be empty string. Recommended: const pageTitle = (post?.meta_title?.trim()) || (post?.title ? `${post.title} | The Local Jewel` : 'The Local Jewel Journal'); and conditionally render Helmet only when post is loaded. This blocks public blog detail viewing AND prevents JSON-LD BlogPosting schema from rendering — both are seed/SEO-critical.
critical_code_review_comments: BlogDetailPage.js: post may render with empty meta_title — must defensively coerce to non-empty string before passing into <title>. The same risk applies to <meta description>, <meta og:title>, and the JSON-LD jsonLd computation if post is null.
admin_routes.py thread reply uses dynamic `from server import ...` inside try/except — works but creates circular-import risk; extract sg/twilio helpers into a shared utils module.

server.py /api/projects/{slug}/inquire — auto-creates a user on email match without OTP verification. This means anyone can claim an existing user's threads via that email. Consider: at minimum, do not return a fully-valid login JWT here; or require email verification flow before merging into an existing user_id.
BlogPayload model lacks length caps (slug/title) — long inputs accepted as-is.

success_rate.frontend: ~91% (10/11 flows pass; blog detail page broken)

test_credentials: Admin: ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). User JWTs are minted by /api/projects/{slug}/inquire on the fly.
seed_data_creation: Created during testing: ~3 contact submissions, ~3 marketplace threads + leads (TEST_User_... emails), 1 blog post (test-post-{ts}) that was then deleted. Updated price on seed project (then restored to 2850).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green via pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase4_features.py. The only outstanding bug is the React Helmet crash on /blog/:slug — verify by simply navigating to /blog/how-to-pick-a-lab-grown-diamond after the fix; JSON-LD BlogPosting script tag must be present in DOM and the article content must render. Test in both prod build and dev — Helmet's invariant only fires in dev mode but production will still produce an empty <title>. Admin and customer dashboard messages flows visually look right but full E2E send-from-customer-dashboard-Messages-tab was not exercised — worth a check if main agent re-tests.
rca_of_issue: BlogDetailPage.js line 61: `const pageTitle = post.meta_title || \`${post.title} | The Local Jewel\`;` — the seeded blog post returned by the API has meta_title as empty string and react-helmet-async invariant throws when given an empty string child of <title>. Even if meta_title were truthy, render order during async data fetch can show post in an intermediate empty-string state. Fix: guard with .trim() and a non-empty literal fallback, and consider gating the Helmet block on post?.title being truthy.
